rejected.title: Blockchain-Based Audit Trail System
rejected.reason: Vendor lock-in risk and no measurable ROI over existing database audit logging. Implementation cost estimated at $1.8M with 3+ year payback. Legal flagged smart contract compliance gaps.
rejected.notes: Revisit only if regulatory requirement mandates distributed audit trail.

rejected.title: AR/VR Customer Onboarding Experience
rejected.reason: No clear ROI signal from customer research. Hardware adoption too low in target enterprise segment. Estimated 2-year lead time before viable user base.
rejected.notes: Good long-term bet but not Q1/Q2 2026 priority. Revisit 2027.

rejected.title: Internal Social Network (Meridian Connect+)
rejected.reason: Duplicate of Slack integration already in place. Employee survey showed 78% preference to stay on existing tools. Engineering estimate was 8 months.
rejected.notes: Invest in Slack integration quality instead.

rejected.title: Cryptocurrency Payment Integration
rejected.reason: Legal and compliance team flagged FATF travel rule exposure, AML policy gaps, and accounting complexity. Tax treatment unclear across 12 operating jurisdictions.
rejected.notes: Blocked by Legal. Re-evaluate if regulatory clarity improves by 2027.

rejected.title: Centralised AI Voice Assistant for Internal Operations
rejected.reason: Privacy concerns with audio recording in shared office spaces. GDPR Article 9 exposure identified. Employee consent framework would take 6+ months to establish.
rejected.notes: Text-based AI assistant approved as alternative. See AI ticketing project.

rejected.title: Monolith-to-Microservices Big Bang Rewrite
rejected.reason: Risk of 12+ month feature freeze was unacceptable. Past big-bang rewrites across industry have 70%+ failure rate. Strangler fig pattern approved as alternative.
rejected.notes: Incremental modernisation via infra migration project instead.
